hero.title: The impact capital allocation gap
hero.lede: Web3 startups with sophisticated products navigate local regulation with uncertainty; sustainability projects don't speak the allocator's language. Without institutional certainty, the cost of allocating capital spikes and shuts the investor out. ReFaz connects these worlds.
hero.statsLabel: Our solutions and the organizations we've contributed to have reached:
hero.caption: ReFaz · Brazil · 2025
diag.label: DIAGNOSIS
diag.title: Two blocked ecosystems, one root cause
diag.c1b: They can't demonstrate results in the language and format demanded by the rigid compliance structures of international capital.
diag.c2b: They navigate the risk of innovation inside a highly regulated environment and, lacking access to regulatory know-how, stay off the allocators' radar.
diag.c3b: They can't reach initiatives that generate real impact or startups with proven growth.
diag.callout: ROOT CAUSE — Information asymmetry raises the cost of trust and paralyzes capital allocation.
sol.label: THE SOLUTION
sol.title: Strategy and technology for social development
sol.lede: A Web3 boutique tackling the core problem through four integrated verticals.
sol.i3p: Blockchain infrastructure for the creative economy and Brazilian culture
how.label: HOW IT WORKS
how.title: 100% aligned with the global IFRS S1 & S2 standards
how.outV: An asset perfectly legible to the global asset manager
track.label: TRACTION & VALIDATION
track.title: Validated where it truly matters
track.lede: Our solutions and products didn't win startup competitions — they're validated by the institutions that write the rules of the financial and governmental game in Brazil.

team.label: TEAM
team.title: The team you can't replicate
team.v1: Legal advisor to the victims of Mariana and Brumadinho, the two largest environmental disasters in Brazil's history — responsible for data analysis, the damage matrix, and highly complex negotiations
team.v2: International research on law, blockchain, and technology at the Ethereum Foundation, Celatam, Kernel, and Latam Legal Hub
team.v3: VP and founder of the Blockchain and Crypto-assets Commission of the OAB-MG (Minas Gerais Bar Association)
team.m1: Contributed to initiatives that raised $5M+ USD for global impact
team.m4: (Postdoctoral) Member of the Center for Studies in International Cooperation for Development (CECID)
